SXSW Outdoor Stage at Lady Bird Lake
Saturday, March 15, 2026 2:00 PM - 11:00 PM
Auditorium Shores
Music
Free

Catch amazing live performances at this iconic outdoor venue along Lady Bird Lake during SXSW week. All ages welcome.

ABC Kite Festival
Sunday, March 16, 2026 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM
Zilker Park
Family
Free

Annual kite festival with kite-making workshops, contests, and food vendors. Perfect for families with kids of all ages.

Kill Tony Live at the Mothership
Friday, March 20, 2026 8:00 PM
Comedy Mothership
Comedy
$25 - $45

Live podcast taping of Kill Tony with surprise guests. 21+ only.
